$comment: Claude Octopus routine manifest (v9.50.0). Saved automation configs for Claude Code routines: schedule triggers map to cron-style saved automations, github triggers map to repository event automations. All routines ship disabled; enable per-project after reviewing provider cost implications (external CLI seats bill to the user's API keys).

routines.name: octo-nightly-security-audit
routines.description: Multi-provider security audit of the working tree every night
routines.costNote: Dispatches codex + agy seats; expect $0.10-0.60 per run

routines.name: octo-weekly-provider-health
routines.description: Provider availability, auth, and version drift check every Monday
routines.costNote: Detection only; no external provider dispatch

routines.name: octo-usage-digest
routines.description: Weekly per-provider cost and token digest from usage records
routines.costNote: Reads local RESULTS_DIR artifacts; no provider dispatch

routines.name: octo-pr-review
routines.description: Multi-provider adversarial review when a pull request opens or updates
routines.costNote: Dispatches codex + agy seats per PR update; gate on repo size
